nasb.text: “Most blessed of women is Jael, The wife of Heber the Kenite; Most blessed is she of women in the tent.

esv.text: “Most blessed of women be Jael, the wife of Heber the Kenite, of tent-dwelling women most blessed.

cnv.text: 願基尼人希伯的妻子雅億， 比眾婦女更有福氣， 比住在帳棚的婦女更有福氣。

ccb.text: “基尼人希百的妻子雅亿是妇人中最有福的， 是住帐篷的妇人中最有福的。
